case_title: NEAL, PATTY VS ANTIQUE MALL INCORPORATED et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $157.33 FILED BY NEAL, PATTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIQUE MALL INCORPORATED SPRADLIN, DAN  (MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEAL, PATTY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANTIQUE MALL INCORPORATED SPRADLIN, DAN  (MANAGER) PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PATTY NEAL RETURNED.
